arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs. Bayer Leverkusen: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will start off their 2024/25 UEFA Champions League campaign away against Feyenoord at De Kuip on Thursday (kick-off: 6.45pm CEST). Alonso's team scored 31 goals in 13 games in the Europa League last season - the highest tally of any club side in European competition in 2023/24 (excluding qualifying matches).

arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs Bayer Leverkusen: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Feyenoord face Bayer Leverkusen for the first time since 1987 on Matchday 1 of the all-new Champions League league phase. Priske's start to life in Rotterdam has been frustrating, with Feyenoord already nine points adrift of Eredivisie holders and current leaders PSV following a string of draws at the start of the new season.

Previously, Juan Carlos Osorio, coach of Tijuana, confirmed Feyenoord's interest in Mora, who according to reports from Mexico was supposed to train with them in Rotterdam. Feyenoord are getting competition in the battle for Gilberto Mora from Club Tijuana .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid the current favourites to land Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz next summer
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz is looking to take the next step in his career in the summer and Real Madrid are leading the way to land his…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen preparing for potential Xabi Alonso departure in the summer
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen are preparing for a potential departure of head coach Xabi Alonso next summer. A decision on the Spaniard’s future is expected to be made in…

arts.ttl: 5 reasons why Bayer Leverkusen will beat Feyenoord in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso's domestic double winners almost went all the way to European glory last season; now Bayer Leverkusen's journey to go that final mile this time around begins at the home of the current Dutch Cup holders Feyenoord in the UEFA Champions League. Now in with the elite of the UEFA Champions League, Bayer 04 are determined to avenge their European heartache, beginning at Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface, a crucial cog in Bayer Leverkusen's all-conquering machine
arts.sum: Florian Wirtz has been tipped for a Ballon d'Or, while Álex Grimaldo's attacking stats make a mockery of his status as a defender, but Victor Boniface may just be Xabi Alonso's most important player at Bayer Leverkusen… Some 100 shots on goal last term, at an average of four per game, might suggest he is a'shoot on sight' kind of striker, but Boniface's decision-making far exceeds that.

arts.ttl: Castore x Banlieue Feyenoord 24-25 Third Kit Released
arts.sum: Castore has collaborated with Rotterdam-based lifestyle brand Banlieue for the Feyenoord 24-25 third kit.
